SMART LRC

A JSON-driven, low-code reporting engine for React applications.

LRC Tutorial - Quick ⏱️

Logiks Reports

Logiks Reports allows developers to build advanced reporting interfaces using configuration instead of custom UI code. It supports multiple presentation formats including grid, cards, kanban, gallery, calendar, gantt, and map views — all powered by a single JSON configuration object.
